name: Jacksonville Housing and Credit Counseling Services, Inc
description_short: Unable to verify company details due to website access error. Jacksonville Housing and Credit Counseling Services appears to be a non-profit counseling organization, but current website is unavailable for fact-checking.
description_long: Jacksonville Housing and Credit Counseling Services, Inc. is listed as a non-profit organization in the free-help category, which typically includes HUD-approved housing counselors and NFCC-certified credit counseling agencies. However, the company's website (https://www.jaxhousingandcreditcounseling.org/contact-us.html) currently returns a 400 Bad Request error, preventing verification of their actual services, credentials, staff qualifications, and service offerings. Without access to their website content, specific details about their counseling programs, pricing structure (if any), geographic service areas, and certifications cannot be confirmed. The organization's name suggests they provide dual services in housing counseling and credit counseling, which are common offerings for non-profit financial counselors in the Jacksonville, Florida area. Any consumer considering this organization should independently verify their current operational status, HUD approval, NFCC certification, and available services before engaging.
pros: Organization name indicates dual focus on housing and credit counseling—comprehensive financial support
Listed as free-help category suggests non-profit status with potential no-cost or low-cost services
Jacksonville-based positioning suggests local expertise and community integration
Appears to target underserved populations typically served by non-profit counselors
cons: Website completely inaccessible (400 error)—cannot verify current operations or legitimacy
No ability to confirm HUD approval, NFCC certification, or counselor credentials
Cannot verify service offerings, hours, or current contact information
No online presence visible to assess service quality or consumer feedback
Potential operational issues if website has been down for extended period
best_for: Jacksonville-area residents seeking non-profit credit or housing counseling
Consumers preferring in-person counseling with local community organizations
Individuals needing debt management or housing stability advice from certified counselors
diagnosis: This organization appears to be a non-profit credit and housing counselor, appropriate for free financial guidance. However, the inaccessible website prevents verification of current legitimacy, certifications, or available services. Consumers should contact them directly via phone or mail to confirm they are operational and obtain current service details before relying on this organization.
